title: A Plan for National Education
article_text: The national government makes a list for education reform. We need to measure the road to better schools. Therefore, we can accord on a new plan. The fund will serve the industry and help kids learn. I wish every kid can wear a uniform and enjoy school. The rest of the money goes to teach teachers. This field of study can certainly kill old problems. It itself is a great chance for change. The death of bad teaching methods is likely. We can claim a good relationship with parents and students.

sentences.en: The national government makes a list for education reform.
sentences.zh: 国家政府为教育改革制定了一个清单。

words.eng_def: a set of items written one after another
the process of teaching and learning

sentences.en: We need to measure the road to better schools.
sentences.zh: 我们需要衡量通往更好学校的道路。

words.eng_def: to find the size or amount of something
a way between places for cars and people

sentences.en: Therefore, we can accord on a new plan.
sentences.zh: 因此，我们可以就一个新计划达成一致。

words.eng_def: to agree or be in agreement

sentences.en: The fund will serve the industry and help kids learn.
sentences.zh: 这笔资金将服务于工业并帮助孩子们学习。

words.eng_def: money saved or used for a purpose
to give help or provide something
the making of goods in factories

sentences.en: I wish every kid can wear a uniform and enjoy school.
sentences.zh: 我希望每个孩子都能穿校服并享受学校生活。

words.eng_def: to have clothes on your body

sentences.en: The rest of the money goes to teach teachers.
sentences.zh: 剩余的钱用于培训教师。

words.eng_def: what is left after part is taken
to give knowledge or show how to do something

sentences.en: This field of study can certainly kill old problems.
sentences.zh: 这个研究领域当然可以消除旧问题。

words.eng_def: an area of study or work
to make something die or end

sentences.en: It itself is a great chance for change.
sentences.zh: 它本身就是一个改变的好机会。

words.eng_def: the same thing as the subject

sentences.en: The death of bad teaching methods is likely.
sentences.zh: 糟糕教学方法的消亡是可能的。

sentences.en: We can claim a good relationship with parents and students.
sentences.zh: 我们可以声称与家长和学生关系良好。

words.eng_def: the way two people or groups feel about each other

What is the English word for '资金'?

image_prompts: A government building with a large list on a table.
A long road leading to a school with a ruler measuring the distance.
Two people shaking hands in agreement over a document.
A pile of coins labeled 'fund' going to a factory and a child studying.
A child wearing a school uniform and smiling while reading a book.
A teacher in front of a classroom with leftover money being used for training.
A scientist in a field of study erasing old problems with a brush.
A glowing opportunity sign pointing to a door of change.
A broken blackboard representing the end of bad teaching methods.
A parent and teacher shaking hands with a student between them.
